evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: - Free and open-source. - No account or subscription required. Bring your own keys. - Fully transparent. No mysteries, no bullshit. - Empowers users with information and full control.

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: ### Project Management Organize workspaces with project shortcuts and quick access

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: ### Unified Timeline Seamless conversation with AI, tool results, and terminal output
